title: Food vendors prevent Apsara from planting new trees at Angkor Wat
highlights: Food vendors prevent Apsara from planting new trees at Angkor Wat | Open Development Cambodia (ODC) The Apsara National Authority has delayed planting trees in front of the Angkor Wat temple after nearly 100 food vendors protested. title: Pre Rup closed, vendors moved | The Phnom Penh Post
highlights: The Apsara National Authority (ANA) has temporarily banned tourists from visiting the Pre Rup temple area at the Angkor Archaeological Park in Siem Reap province because parts of the temple have become unstable and pose a safety risk.
